title: Front Office Manager - Impresario Entertainment - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Impresario Entertainment - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Impresario Entertainment is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Hyderabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Impresario Entertainment:
Impresario Entertainment is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Impresario Entertainment!
